text: You can also request that we rectify or erase any personal data we hold about you. However, all requests for rectification must be handled directly by our third-party server host, and you must contact them directly rather than us. • The right to withdraw consent • The right of access. However, please note we will not provide confirmation to you as to whether or not personal data concerning you is being processed. • The right to erasure • The right to rectification • The right to data portability • The right to object. The right to object is strictly limited to our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns.
